description: Expected validation state for the mx_unam_apa7 sample project (UNAM posgrado, APA 7, biodiversidad tropical — enhanced)
notes: UNAM posgrado — Ciencias Biológicas, biodiversidad tropical y cambio climático. Enhanced: 10 BibTeX entries across 5 types (IPCC report, books, journal articles, CONABIO report), 13 citation blocks distributed across 5 sections (intro×3, marco×4, met×2, disc×2), Spanish + English abstracts, MaxEnt ecological niche modelling methodology, SSP climate scenarios, herpetofauna and avifauna field surveys, CONAHCYT + PAPIIT funding. Candidate for verified status once CI passes.
